title: Xibo
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Xibo''''' was a group of three [[Modular conveyor|Modular Conveyors]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. The group, under escort from the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Tegret]]'', were delivering R'alla H2O in the [[Atterol system/Legends|Atterol system]] when they were attacked by Rebels intending to capture the ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''

[[Category:Imperial Navy units]]
